return(function(...)local end,function(z,a)local Y=J(a)local I=function(...)return A(z,{...},a,Y)end return I end,function(A,I,c,q)local kY,DY,Z,PY,ZY,iY,WY,YY,P,j,qY,yY,D,nY,W,JY,gY,EY,r,sY,NY,vY,bY,u,XY,UY,N,K,cY,aY,S,IY,HY,VY,mY,fY,hY,p,pY,R,wY,AY,e,X,rY,uY,C,G,F,o,FY,w,k,L,zY,x,l,M,B,jY,CY,t,J,RY,b,m,d,T,U,OY,oY,QY while A do if
